description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🕒 10:00–16:30

First public showing of the 7000 series train, traverser rides, mini train (¥200), driving simulator, 52-seat luxury car display, food trucks, and picnic area. Free admission. Rain or shine; cancelled only in severe weather. Last entry 15:00.

More details: https://www.seiburailway.jp/sightseeing/eventcampaigninfo/musashigaokafesta/
location: 武蔵丘車両検修場 (日高市台462-1、西武池袋線「高麗駅」徒歩約15分)
summary: Seibu Train Festa 2026 at Musashioka Vehicle Maintenance Yard
